response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development, particularly in backend systems, high-performance applications, and polyglot programming. However, his experience with C++ is limited to early roles (e.g., National Instruments) and lacks recent C++ development, especially in industrial automation or cybersecurity contexts. His strengths lie in full-stack and distributed systems, but he does not meet the core requirement of 8+ years of C++ development with STL and object-oriented principles for this role.
strengths: Extensive backend and distributed systems experience with Node.js, DLang, and Java
Proven track record in high-performance applications (e.g., real-time metadata systems, low-latency apps)
Strong focus on test-driven development (TDD), CI/CD, and software craftsmanship
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last significant C++ work was in 2015)
No clear experience with industrial automation, IoT, or cybersecurity standards like IEC 62443
Lacks exposure to message brokers, REST/MQTT, or cloud platforms (e.g., Azure) relevant to the role
